testcase.name: defaultsCorrectly
testcase.system-out:
22:08:01.887 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.images.PullPolicy -- Image pull policy will be performed by: DefaultPullPolicy() 22:08:01.892 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.ImageNameSubstitutor -- Image name substitution will be performed by: DefaultImageNameSubstitutor (composite of 'ConfigurationFileImageNameSubstitutor' and 'PrefixingImageNameSubstitutor') 22:08:01.944 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Testcontainers version: 1.21.3 22:08:02.528 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.dockerclient.DockerClientProviderStrategy -- Found Docker environment with Docker accessed via Unix socket (/Users/nicholasl/.docker/run/docker.sock) 22:08:02.530 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Docker host IP address is localhost 22:08:02.553 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Connected to docker: Server Version: 25.0.3 API Version: 1.44 Operating System: Docker Desktop Total Memory: 7842 MB 22:08:02.583 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Creating container for image: testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 22:08:02.642 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RegistryAuthLocator -- Credential helper/store (docker-credential-desktop) does not have credentials for https://index.docker.io/v1/ 22:08:02.799 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 is starting: efd826f11cd33bc11432a67e5398e59262d22dc6116cc172052b773ef140a6d9 22:08:03.187 [main] INFO tc.testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 -- Container testcontainers/ryuk:0.12.0 started in PT0.603629S 22:08:03.197 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.utility.RyukResourceReaper -- Ryuk started - will monitor and terminate Testcontainers containers on JVM exit 22:08:03.197 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- Checking the system... 22:08:03.198 [main] INFO org.testcontainers.DockerClientFactory -- ✔︎ Docker server version should be at least 1.6.0 22:08:03.361 [main] INFO tc.pgvector/pgvector:pg16 -- Creating container for image: pgvector/pgvector:pg16 22:08:03.409 [main] INFO tc.pgvector/pgvector:pg16 -- Container pgvector/pgvector:pg16 is starting: 8e2ad0e71367a0e0fe726bcd4a67c61734594dba72b4fd6869966b2264f431e0 22:08:04.964 [main] INFO tc.pgvector/pgvector:pg16 -- Container pgvector/pgvector:pg16 started in PT1.602696S 22:08:04.965 [main] INFO tc.pgvector/pgvector:pg16 -- Container is started (JDBC URL: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:51582/test?loggerLevel=OFF) 22:08:05.012 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
